# Pictelio (pixivizer)

> A third-party Pixiv illustration browser built with SolidJS, packaged as a native Android app with Capacitor.

Pictelio is a mobile-first single-page application that lets users browse Pixiv illustrations through a clean, modern interface. The app communicates with Pixiv's private API to deliver a native-feeling experience entirely in the browser, with optional Android packaging via Capacitor.

Key capabilities: infinite virtual-scrolling feed of recommended and followed illustrations, full-screen image viewer with touch gestures, Pixiv OAuth login, bookmark management, personal center with user illustration browsing, configurable theme (light/dark/system), proxy settings for region-restricted access, and tab-based search.

Authentication is handled through Pixiv's OAuth endpoint. API requests are proxied through the app's backend to avoid CORS issues and support proxy configuration.

## Pages

- [Feed (Recommended)](/): Main illustration recommendation feed with virtual scrolling
- [Feed (Following)](/following): Illustrations from followed artists
- [Illust Detail](/illust/:id): Full-size viewer with zoom, pan, and metadata
- [Login](/login): Pixiv OAuth sign-in page
- [Bookmarks](/bookmarks): Saved and bookmarked illustrations
- [Personal Center](/me): User profile, preferences, and stats
- [User Illusts](/user/:id/illusts): Browse illustrations by a specific artist
- [Settings](/me): Theme (light/dark/system), proxy, language configuration
- [About](/about): App information, version, and credits
- [Age Confirmation](/age-confirmation): Age verification gate

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/a1121611810/pixivizer): Full source code, issue tracker, and release downloads
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy.html): Data collection, storage, and privacy practices
- [Pixiv API](https://github.com/zijin0/pixiv-api): Third-party Pixiv API client library used by the app
- [Google Site Verification](/google6dcb87af9dbd350f.html): Domain ownership verification file
